hero.eyebrow: أول منصة HR AI-Native في العالم
hero.title: ثورة في إدارة الموارد البشرية بالذكاء الاصطناعي
hero.description: PeoplePulseAI هي أول شركة نظام HR AI-native في العالم. نحن لا نوفر فقط تقنية HR المتطورة، بل أيضًا خدمات تأمين محلية عالمية شاملة لحماية موظفيك في أي مكان.

clients.title: موثوق به من قبل أكثر من 10,000 شركة

features.title: ميزات قوية لفريق الموارد البشرية الحديث

onboarding.title: التأهيل الذكي
onboarding.description: بسط عملية تأهيل الموظفين باستخدام سير عمل AI والتوثيق الآلي ومسارات التدريب الشخصية.

analytics.title: التحليلات المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي
analytics.description: احصل على رؤى عميقة حول اتجاهات القوى العاملة واتخذ قرارات based on البيانات مع منصة التحليلات المتقدمة لدينا.

performance.title: إدارة الأداء
performance.description: تتبع وتحسين أداء الموظفين مع المراجعات الآلية وتتبع الأهداف وتخطيط التطوير.

compliance.title: إدارة الامتثال
compliance.description: حافظ على الامتثال مع تحديثات السياسة الآلية وإدارة المستندات وأنظمة تتبع اللوائح.

modules.title: الوحدات الأساسية، تغطية شاملة للموارد البشرية
modules.description: تغطي منصتنا الشاملة كل جانب من جوانب إدارة الموارد البشرية مع تكامل سلس.

testimonials.title: موثوق به من قادة الصناعة
testimonials.description: شاهد ما يقوله عملاؤنا عن تجربتهم مع PeoplePulse.

items.quote: لقد قام PeoplePulse بثورة في عمليات الموارد البشرية لدينا. ساعدتنا الرؤى المدعومة بالذكاء الاصطناعي على اتخاذ قرارات أفضل لقوى العاملة لدينا.
items.name: سارة ستيفنز

items.quote: وفر لنا التأهيل الآلي ساعات لا حصر لها وحسن تجربة الموظفين الجدد بشكل كبير.
items.name: مايك تشن

items.quote: تمنحنا لوحة تحليلات الرؤية الفورية لمقاييس القوى العاملة لدينا. لقد غيرت استراتيجية الموارد البشرية لدينا.
items.name: جيسيكا براون

pricingPage.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricingPage.description: Choose the plan that fits your organization's needs. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.
pricingPage.compareDesc: See which plan is right for your organization
pricingPage.faqDesc: Everything you need to know about our pricing
pricingPage.stillQuestionsDesc: Our team is here to help you find the perfect plan for your organization.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for small businesses just getting started with HR management

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Advanced features for growing businesses with more complex HR needs

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: Complete HR management solution for large organizations

faqs.question: How does the pricing work?
faqs.answer: Our pricing is per employee per month. You only pay for active employees in your system. There are no hidden fees or long-term contracts.

faqs.question: Can I switch plans?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer a 14-day free trial for Starter and Professional plans. No credit card required.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept all major credit cards, bank transfers, and PayPal. Enterprise customers can also pay via invoice.

faqs.question: Do you offer discounts for nonprofits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer special pricing for nonprofits and educational institutions. Contact our sales team for details.

faqs.question: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faqs.answer: You can export all your data at any time. We retain your data for 30 days after cancellation, then securely delete it.

blogPage.title: Latest Insights & Resources
blogPage.description: Stay informed with our latest thoughts on HR technology and workplace innovation.
blogPage.newsletterDesc: Get the latest HR insights, tips, and best practices delivered straight to your inbox.

featuresPage.title: Powerful Features for Modern HR Teams
featuresPage.description: Our comprehensive suite of AI-powered tools transforms how you manage your human resources, from onboarding to performance management and beyond.

smartOnboarding.title: Smart Onboarding
smartOnboarding.description: Streamline employee onboarding with AI-powered workflows, automated documentation, and personalized training paths.

aiAnalytics.title: AI-Powered Analytics
aiAnalytics.description: Gain deep insights into workforce trends and make data-driven decisions with our advanced analytics platform.

performance.title: Performance Management
performance.description: Track and optimize employee performance with automated reviews, goal tracking, and development planning.

compliance.title: Compliance Management
compliance.description: Stay compliant with automated policy updates, document management, and regulatory tracking systems.

predictive.title: Predictive Analytics
predictive.description: Our AI analyzes patterns in your workforce data to predict future trends and help you proactively address issues.

recruiting.title: Intelligent Recruiting
recruiting.description: Streamline your hiring process with AI-powered candidate matching, automated screening, and bias detection.

automation.title: Workflow Automation
automation.description: Automate repetitive HR tasks and free up your team to focus on strategic initiatives.

global.title: Global HR Management
global.description: Manage your global workforce with multi-country payroll, compliance, and localized experiences.

security.title: Enterprise Security
security.description: Bank-grade security with SSO, role-based access control, and data encryption.

attendance.title: Time & Attendance
attendance.description: Track employee time, manage leave requests, and ensure accurate payroll calculations.

documents.title: Document Management
documents.description: Centralize all HR documents with version control, e-signatures, and secure storage.

selfService.title: Employee Self-Service
selfService.description: Empower employees with self-service access to their information, requests, and company resources.

oneClickPayroll.title: One-Click Payroll
oneClickPayroll.description: Calculate salaries, taxes, and benefits with a single click. Save hours of manual work every month.

oneClickStoreScheduling.title: One-Click Store Scheduling
oneClickStoreScheduling.description: Automatically generate optimal schedules for retail stores based on foot traffic and staff availability.

oneClickFactoryScheduling.title: One-Click Factory Scheduling
oneClickFactoryScheduling.description: Create efficient shift schedules for manufacturing facilities considering production targets and labor regulations.

smartScheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
smartScheduling.description: AI-powered scheduling that adapts to your business needs and employee preferences.
